title: Greedy Best-First Search Pathfinding Process
description: A visual representation of a graph being traversed using the Greedy Best-First Search algorithm, highlighting the heuristic-driven path selection.
relationships: Algorithm starts at S and adds it to the Open Set
Node with lowest h(n) is selected and expanded (moved to Closed Set)
Neighbors of the expanded node are added to the Open Set with their h(n)
Process repeats, greedily selecting the node closest to the goal by heuristic estimate
Goal node is found, and the path is traced back through parent pointers
